mapper.select: select count(1) from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) where date(created_at) = current_date
select count(1) from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) where status in ('COMPLETED', 'SIGNED', 'DELIVERED')
select count(1) from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) where status in ('WAIT_DISPATCH', 'CREATED')
select count(1) from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) where status = 'IN_TRANSIT'
select count(1) from logistics_exception where exception_status != 'CLOSED'
select coalesce(sum(actual_fee), 0) from logistics_fee where payment_status = 'PAID'
select status, count(1) as total from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) group by status order by total desc

select e.id, o.order_no, e.exception_type, e.exception_status, coalesce(ru.username, e.report_user) as report_user, e.report_time from logistics_exception e join logistics_order o on o.id = e.order_id left join sys_user ru on concat('', ru.id) = e.report_user where e.exception_status != 'CLOSED' order by e.report_time desc limit 5

select c.id, c.employee_id as employeeId, c.contract_no as contractNo, date_format(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate from hr_contract c where c.contract_status = 1 and c.end_date is not null and c.end_date between current_date and date_add(current_date, interval #{days} day)

select count(1) from logistics_order where (#{customerId} is null or customer_id = #{customerId}) where date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m') = date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m')
select count(1) from logistics_exception where date_format(report_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(date_sub(current_date, interval 1 month), '%Y-%m')
